name: Oberlin College
meets_full_need_notes: Oberlin meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Oberlin includes loans in most aid packages. Loan amounts vary by family income. No blanket loan-free policy, but self-help expectations are modest for lower-income families.

merit_thresholds.notes: Oberlin offers merit scholarships including the Oberlin College Scholarship and talent-based awards for music conservatory students. Merit awards are competitive and not automatic.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based aid consideration. Applying ED does not disadvantage applicants financially; full need is met regardless of round.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal aid awards by submitting a formal request to the Office of Student Financial Aid with supporting documentation of changed or unusual circumstances.
